GUIDING INTENTION
COLLAPSE
$1M ARR in 12 months. Zero founder dependency. Capital preservation. Sellable businesses.

9 Enterprises LLC is the holding company. Ten active companies under The Franchise. Core 9 enterprise solution + modular add-on features (freeagent9, trader9, agent9). SaaS subscription playbook — one core subscription, modular upsells. AI education content platform feeds the top of funnel. Every product 9 builds ships as a revenue-generating asset, not a side project.
